species: To establish a more robust protocol for the proteomics analysis of S-fatty-acylated proteins, we first optimized CuI-azide-alkyne cycloaddition (CuAAC) and enrichment of alk-16 labeled proteins in RAW264.7 murine macrophages.
cell_line: To evaluate the generality of our proteomic methods, we employed the alk-16 +/− NH2OH chemical reporter method and acyl-RAC to selectively identify S-fatty-acylated proteins in HeLa epithelial cells.
